link.title: Reviewing & fixing your model
link.description: Kiln checks your model two ways — deterministic validators and an AI reviewer — and gives you the tools to drive every concern to a clean end state: fix it for real, or accept it on purpose. This section covers findings, the AI Review loop, the two kinds of fix, how to read progress (and spot a loop), how to accept a concern for good, and how your hand-made changes are protected.
